allow: Bash(git -C "c:/redwood-shores-coalition" add css/ js/ index.html images/)

Bash(git -C "c:/redwood-shores-coalition" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Redwood Shores Coalition website

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "c:/redwood-shores-coalition" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Google Sheets integration for News & Updates section

News items are now fetched dynamically from a published Google Sheet CSV.
Editors can update the sheet and changes appear on the site automatically.
Static content serves as fallback if fetch fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "c:/redwood-shores-coalition" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Limit news to 3 items and add Read More links

- Display only the first 3 news items from the sheet
- Support optional ''link'' column for Read More links
- Links open in new tab with noopener for security

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "c:/redwood-shores-coalition" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add CLAUDE.md for project context

Documents project overview, tech stack, file structure, Google Sheets
integration, local dev setup, and related resources for future sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add hero images, CNAME file, and stat card animations

- Add all hero background images \(Hero-1.png through Hero-4.png\)
- Add CNAME file for GitHub Pages custom domain support
- Implement left-to-right slide animation for stat cards with stagger effect
- Update subheader styling for uniform appearance across Take Action section
- Add ForAI reference materials and mobile research documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update documentation for hero section messaging structure

- Document three-tier messaging hierarchy: Title → Tagline → Subtitle
- Add tagline "Our Shores. Our Home." to site sections description
- Include responsive typography specifications
- Clarify hero section components and CTA buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
